==Chinese==
{{zh-forms|s=иҜЈ}}

===Glyph origin===
{{Han etym}}
By ''{{w|Shuowen}}'' and ''{{w|ja:еӯ—зөұ#еӯ—йҖҡ|JitsЕ«}}'', and following Zhengzhang (2003), a {{Han compound|ls=psc|иЁҖ|ж—Ё|c1=s|c2=p|nocap=1}}.

Alternatively, {{Han compound|ls=ic|иЁҖ|ж—Ё|t1=speech|t2=delicious|nocap=1}} вҖ” word use so skilled as to be delicious. The first interpretation is seemingly most accepted.
